nasb.text: He touched my mouth with it and said, “Behold, this has touched your lips; and your iniquity is taken away and your sin is forgiven.”

esv.text: And he touched my mouth and said: “Behold, this has touched your lips; your guilt is taken away, and your sin atoned for.”

cnv.text: 他用炭沾我的口，說：“看哪！這炭沾了你的嘴唇，你的罪孽就除掉，你的罪惡就赦免了。”

ccb.text: 用炭碰我的嘴唇，说：“看啊，这炭碰了你的嘴唇，你的过犯已被除掉，你的罪恶已被赦免。”

csbs.text: 他用炭碰我的嘴，说： “看哪，这炭碰了你的嘴唇， 你的罪孽已除掉， 你的罪恶已赎清！”
